title: Allay Filter
description: Bundles behave as filters for an allay. Allowing players to specify a set of items or even all items!
body:
Feel free to download and play with this mod and enjoy the following features.

## Allay
In this mod the [allay][allay] is only modified to behave differently when given a [bundle][bundle]. The modified behavior tries to make the functionality of the mob more applicable in the following ways.

## Empty Bundle
When the allay is given an empty bundle it will collect **all items** it sees instead of the specific matching bundle. So no need to bring multiple allays or reconfigure an allay while out in the world when everything is desired.

## Filled Bundle
For more refined scenarios the bundle can be filled with items to make the allay collect only **filtered items**. It works similar to each item within the bundle being carried by an individual allay. So no need for an army of allays when you want to collect a set of items.

## Bundle inside Bundle
In order for the allay collect a **specific bundle** like it would originally with a bundle, simply put the specific bundle inside any bundle and give it to the allay. The filter only works one layer deep, so putting items in a bundle that is inside a bundle will not be collected by the allay.

[allay]: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Allay "Allay (wiki)"
[bundle]: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Bundle "Bundle (wiki)"
